Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.scope

Class MainConfiguration

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.scope.MainConfiguration
All Implemented Interfaces:
Configuration
public final class MainConfiguration
extends Object
implements Configuration
Configures the behavior of a single verifier.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors 
    Constructor Description
    MainConfiguration()
    Creates a new configuration: With an empty context. That throws the default exception type. Whose assertions are enabled if assertions are enabled on this class. That omits exception stack traces that reference this library. That shows the difference between the actual and expected values. That invokes Arrays.toString() for arrays and Object.toString() for all other objects to convert them to a String.

  • Method Summary

    Methods declared in class java.lang.Object

    equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.Configuration

    assertionsAreEnabled, getContext, isCleanStackTrace, isDiffEnabled, putContext, removeContext, toString, withAssertionsDisabled, withAssertionsEnabled, withCleanStackTrace, withConfiguration, withDiff, withoutCleanStackTrace, withoutDiff, withoutStringConverter, withStringConverter

  • Constructor Details

    • MainConfiguration

      public MainConfiguration()
      Creates a new configuration:
      • With an empty context.
      • That throws the default exception type.
      • Whose assertions are enabled if assertions are enabled on this class.
      • That omits exception stack traces that reference this library.
      • That shows the difference between the actual and expected values.
      • That invokes Arrays.toString() for arrays and Object.toString() for all other objects to convert them to a String.
